title: Interface synthesis bug: Logic missing from main evaluation path ?

features.name: interface with modport signal assignment
features.description: Code should include an interface with logic signal and modport declarations, with a module driving interface signal via assign statement through modport

features.name: multiple separate interface instances
features.description: Code should include multiple separate interface instances (not array) passed to different module instances for signal routing

features.name: interface signal read via receiver modport
features.description: Code should include a receiver module that reads interface signals via input modport and assigns to output ports
